message.content:
Test file: src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Activate test: "should oscillate a blinker pattern (oscillator)"
Current state: 8 tests passing, 1 todo test
Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts

The implementation already has the full Game of Life algorithm.

For this test, use the blinker pattern from the spec:
Gen 0 (vertical): [[0,0],[0,1],[0,2]]
Gen 1 (horizontal): [[-1,1],[0,1],[1,1]]

Assert that nextGeneration([[0,0],[0,1],[0,2]]) produces exactly [[-1,1],[0,1],[1,1]] (use sorted comparison).

Also verify it oscillates back: nextGeneration(gen1) should equal gen0 (sorted).

The implementation already handles this correctly. This test will be "already green."

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
You MUST output the full Step 7 block verbatim (both Compilation
Prediction and Runtime Prediction lines, each with Correct or
Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction
lines into one.
